content:
# Session 133 — Review of Archon iter-133

## Metadata
- **Iteration**: 133 (canonical)
- **Session id**: session_133 (matches iter-133)
- **Stage**: prover (intentional skip — no prover lane this iter)
- **Sorry count before**: 3 (`Jacobian.lean:192` `genusZeroWitness`, `Jacobian.lean:213` `nonempty_jacobianWitness`, `RigidityKbar.lean:87` `rigidity_over_kbar`)
- **Sorry count after**: 3 (unchanged)
- **Targets attempted**: 0 prover attempts (no prover lane). 1 refactor lane on `Cotangent/GrpObj.lean` (docstring + 1 style nit); 1 blueprint-writer on `RigidityKbar.tex`; 4 critic/analogist dispatches in the plan phase.
- **Files edited**: `AlgebraicJacobian/Cotangent/GrpObj.lean` (refactor; 285 → 296 LOC, no semantic change), `blueprint/src/chapters/RigidityKbar.tex` (writer; 324 → 511 LOC).
- **Compile status**: clean. `lean_diagnostic_messages` returns `[]` on `Cotangent/GrpObj.lean` per the iter-133 refactor report. No regression.
- **Axiom posture**: `lean_verify AlgebraicGeometry.GrpObj.cotangentSpaceAtIdentity_finrank_eq` unchanged at `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` (kernel-only, iter-132 close preserved). No new project axioms; `archon-protected.yaml` unchanged (9 protected signatures).

## Headline outcome

**Iter-133 was a plan-only + parallel-writer + parallel-refactor iter — NO prover lane fired.** `meta.json` records `planValidate.status: ok_intentional_skip` and `prover.durationSecs: 0`. Per iter-133 `PROGRESS.md` § "Current Objectives": the iter-133 blueprint-reviewer's HARD GATE DEFERred piece (i.b) prover dispatch because `RigidityKbar.tex` § `lem:GrpObj_mulRight_globalises` was under-spec'd for the prover (missing signature stub, name-vs-construction unclear, no named Mathlib lemma for the base-change-of-differentials helper). Combined with the iter-132 META-PATTERN TRIPWIRE non-promise commitment (no 4th body reshape on `cotangentSpaceAtIdentity`), iter-133 executed an intentional plan-phase deepening:

- **6 subagent dispatches** all returned cleanly:
  - 3 mandatory plan-phase critics (`strategy-critic-iter133`, `blueprint-reviewer-iter133`, `progress-critic-iter133`).
  - 1 mathlib-analogist on piece (i.b) `mulRight_globalises_cotangent` (returned PROCEED + ALIGN_WITH_MATHLIB on sheaf-level RHS + 2 NEEDS_MATHLIB_GAP_FILL sub-pieces; refutes the iter-130 strategy-critic Q2 worry).
  - 1 blueprint-writer (`rigiditykbar-piecei-iterb-prep-iter133`) hardened `lem:GrpObj_mulRight_globalises`, added 2 helper sub-lemmas (`lem:GrpObj_omega_basechange_proj` and `lem:GrpObj_omega_restrict_to_identity_section`, both `\notready`), bundled MED-B (`lem:GrpObj_cotangentSpace_extendScalars_witness` block) + MED-C (rewrite-pattern paragraph rewrite); chapter 324 → 511 LOC.
  - 1 refactor (`cotangent-grpobj-docstring-refresh-iter133`) refreshed 5 stale-framing docstring sites in `Cotangent/GrpObj.lean` + swapped `set ... with _def` → `let` for 3 chart witnesses in the rank-lemma proof body; no semantic change.
- **STRATEGY.md substantively revised** in 5 places per the iter-133 plan agent: ground (iv) reinstated SCOPE-NARROW as iter-132 piece (i.a) tractability evidence; fibre-free piece (i) reformulation evaluated on a 4-axis scorecard (decision: STAY ON Replacement (B)); ℙ¹-specific rigidity hedge + higher-Kähler-vanishing analogists schedule-advanced iter-140 → iter-135–138; sequencing table updates (piece (i.a) DONE, piece (i.b) envelope 210–440 LOC sheaf-level RHS, piece (i.c) LOC inflated 100–300 → 200–500); gap inventory expanded with 2 new piece-(i.b) sub-pieces.

The iter-133 plan agent intentionally skipped the prover lane in favor of plan-phase deepening; this is the correct response per the HARD GATE rule (a weak blueprint produces low-quality prover work the next iter throws away).

## Per-target detail

### `AlgebraicGeometry.GrpObj.cotangentSpaceAtIdentity_finrank_eq` — DONE iter-132 (no iter-133 work)

Closed iter-132 (`AlgebraicJacobian/Cotangent/GrpObj.lean:244–282`) with no `sorry`, kernel-only axioms. Iter-133 only refreshed surrounding docstrings (5 sites, all in this file's file-level header + `## Status` block + the `cotangentSpaceAtIdentity` declaration docstring) and swapped 3 `set ... with _def` introductions to `let` in the rank-lemma proof body. **No semantic change**; the proof closes identically (`lean_diagnostic_messages → []`).

### `AlgebraicGeometry.GrpObj.mulRight_globalises_cotangent` — DEFERRED iter-134+

Piece (i.b) of the cotangent-vanishing pile. Iter-133 plan-phase staged the iter-134+ prover dispatch:

- **Blueprint hardening**: `lem:GrpObj_mulRight_globalises` now carries a full Lean signature stub (sheaf-level RHS at the `PresheafOfModules` level, NOT value-level `cotangentSpaceAtIdentity G`), a `mulRight`-vs-σ option (i) explanatory paragraph citing `CategoryTheory.GrpObj.mulRight` + `GrpObj.isPullback`, a 3-step proof structure (Step 1 shear iso, Step 2 base-change of differentials, Step 3 restriction along section), and a Mathlib-name summary.
- **Helper decomposition**: two new helper sub-lemmas added — `lem:GrpObj_omega_basechange_proj` (load-bearing `Ω_{(G ×_k G)/G} ≅ pr_2^* Ω_{G/k}` identification; ~150–300 LOC; `\notready`) and `lem:GrpObj_omega_restrict_to_identity_section` (section restriction; ~30–80 LOC; `\notready`).
- **Mathlib alignment**: persistent file at `analogies/mulright-globalises-cotangent.md` records the iter-133 mathlib-analogist's Decisions 1–4 and the refutation of the iter-130 strategy-critic Q2 `(B)→(A)` bridge worry.
- **Envelope**: piece (i.b) total 210–440 LOC under sheaf-level RHS. Trigger (a') (over-k vs over-`k̄` re-open) does NOT fire under sheaf-level RHS; it fires only if iter-134+ chooses value-level-stalk RHS.

### `genusZeroWitness` / `nonempty_jacobianWitness` / `rigidity_over_kbar` — DEFERRED (scaffolds, gated)

Per STRATEGY.md sequencing: `genusZeroWitness` body closure iter-138+; `nonempty_jacobianWitness` (Phase-C OFF-LIMITS) iter-148+; `rigidity_over_kbar` body iter-144+ at earliest. No iter-133 attempt; no plan-side scheduling changes (the iter-132 META-PATTERN TRIPWIRE non-promise remains binding).

## Iter-133 attempts data note

`/home/archon/FormalizationProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge/.archon/proof-journal/current_session/attempts_raw.jsonl` contains events from 2026-05-17 17:14–17:19 — these are **iter-132 prover events** (the iter-132 close of `cotangentSpaceAtIdentity_finrank_eq`), not iter-133 events. Iter-133 started 2026-05-17 17:42:13Z and recorded `prover.durationSecs: 0` (no prover lane). The stale `attempts_raw.jsonl` is a benign artefact of the loop infrastructure not re-clearing `current_session/` between iters when no prover ran. Iter-132's attempts are already canonicalised in `session_132/milestones.jsonl` (which was written at iter-132 review time) and need not be re-recorded here.

## Plan-phase subagent outcomes (already absorbed in plan.md; summarised here for the record)

| Subagent | Verdict | Action |
|---|---|---|
| `strategy-critic-iter133` | **SOUND** with 3 minor-to-major CHALLENGEs (4 routes audited, 0 REJECT) | All 3 CHALLENGEs absorbed via STRATEGY.md edits; 2 minor schedule-advance recommendations ADOPTED (ℙ¹ hedge + higher-Kähler analogists iter-140 → iter-135–138). |
| `blueprint-reviewer-iter133` | `RigidityKbar.tex` `complete: partial` / `correct: partial` (must-fix); `Jacobian.tex` `complete: true` / `correct: partial` (soft drift); 3 broken `\ref{...}` in `Cohomology_MayerVietoris.tex` (deferred). **HARD GATE DEFER** piece (i.b) prover lane; PARTIAL GREEN on refactor + MED-B/C bundle. | Must-fix absorbed via Wave-2 `blueprint-writer-rigiditykbar-piecei-iterb-prep-iter133`. Soft drift + broken refs deferred iter-134+. |
| `progress-critic-iter133` | 1 CONVERGING (Route 1 piece (i.a)) + 3 UNCLEAR (Route 2 `Jacobian.lean` deferred-by-design, Route 3 `RigidityKbar.lean` deferred-by-design, Route 4 piece (i.b) fresh / planner correctly analogist-first); 0 CHURNING, 0 STUCK. | Iter-133 dispatch shape endorsed. META-PATTERN TRIPWIRE remains as guardrail. |
| `mathlib-analogist-mulright-globalises-iter133` | **PROCEED** + **ALIGN_WITH_MATHLIB on sheaf-level RHS** (Decision 4) + 2 NEEDS_MATHLIB_GAP_FILL sub-pieces + REFUTES iter-130 strategy-critic Q2 (Decision 3). | Verdict folded into the Wave-2 blueprint-writer directive; persistent file `analogies/mulright-globalises-cotangent.md`. Piece (i.b) envelope 210–440 LOC. |
| `blueprint-writer-rigiditykbar-piecei-iterb-prep-iter133` | COMPLETE — 3 substantive edits: (1) hardened `lem:GrpObj_mulRight_globalises`; (2) added 2 new helper sub-lemmas; (3) bundled MED-B + MED-C. Chapter 324 → 511 LOC. | All iter-133 blueprint-reviewer must-fix items absorbed. |
| `refactor-cotangent-grpobj-docstring-refresh-iter133` | COMPLETE — 5 docstring refreshes (file-level header, `## Status` block, 3 sites in `cotangentSpaceAtIdentity` declaration docstring) + 1 style nit (`set ... with _def` → `let` for 3 chart witnesses in rank-lemma proof body). File 285 → 296 LOC; sorry count unchanged at 0; kernel-only axioms unchanged. | All iter-132 `lean-auditor-review132` major findings on stale docstrings + MED-D style nit cleared. |

## Review-phase subagent dispatches this iter (2)

1. **`lean-auditor-review133`** — whole-project with focus on `Cotangent/GrpObj.lean` (the iter-133 refactor target). Verdict: **0 must-fix / 8 major / 5 minor / 0 excuse-comments**. The 8 majors are **all stale line-number anchors NEWLY introduced by the iter-133 refactor** — docstring expansion pushed declarations down (+12 lines) without re-targeting line-number anchors. Targets: `cotangentSpaceAtIdentity` "line 149" → 161; `cotangentSpaceAtIdentity_eq_extendScalars` "line 198" → 210; `cotangentSpaceAtIdentity_finrank_eq` "line 244" → 256. Pure-docstring fix, ~5 LOC; see `recommendations.md` HIGH-Z. Iter-132 stale-framing findings are confirmed resolved. The 3 known scaffold sorries logged INFO. Report at `.archon/task_results/lean-auditor-review133.md`.

2. **`lean-vs-blueprint-checker-cotangent-grpobj-review133`** — verdict: **PASS** with 2 minor blueprint-side line-number drifts (`RigidityKbar.tex` lines 159 and 493 cite stale Lean line ranges 198–219 → 210–231 and 276–282 → 285–294 respectively). Iter-132 MED-B (`\lean{cotangentSpaceAtIdentity_eq_extendScalars}` block) and MED-C (rewrite-pattern paragraph) confirmed absorbed. The new iter-133 `\notready` helper blocks and hardened `lem:GrpObj_mulRight_globalises` correctly describe iter-134+ deferred work. The 3 Lean declarations (`cotangentSpaceAtIdentity`, `_eq_extendScalars`, `_finrank_eq`) all match the blueprint stubs verbatim. Report at `.archon/task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-cotangent-grpobj-review133.md`.

Both reports folded into `recommendations.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)

None this iter. Reasoning:
- The iter-133 blueprint-writer added new lemma blocks (`lem:GrpObj_omega_basechange_proj`, `lem:GrpObj_omega_restrict_to_identity_section`) but kept them `\notready` because the underlying Lean declarations do not yet exist. Correct.
- The iter-133 blueprint-writer added a new `lem:GrpObj_cotangentSpace_extendScalars_witness` block (MED-B bundle) that points to the Lean declaration `cotangentSpaceAtIdentity_eq_extendScalars` (closed iter-131 at `Cotangent/GrpObj.lean:198`). The blueprint-writer descriptor's MUST-NOT rule keeps the writer from adding `\leanok`; the deterministic `sync_leanok` phase that runs between prover and review handles this. Verified post-sync_leanok the marker landed (`grep '\leanok' blueprint/src/chapters/RigidityKbar.tex | grep cotangentSpace_extendScalars_witness` indicates the line carries `\leanok`).
- `lem:GrpObj_mulRight_globalises` retains its `\notready` (the Lean declaration `mulRight_globalises_cotangent` does not yet exist; deferred iter-134+).
- No `\mathlibok` additions: none of the iter-133 changes turn a project-side declaration into a Mathlib re-export.
- No `\notready` stripping: every block currently marked `\notready` still has no Lean side.
- No `\lean{...}` corrections: no prover renamed anything this iter (no prover lane).
- No `% NOTE:` additions: no new translation gaps surfaced.

## Notes

- `archon-protected.yaml` unchanged (9 protected signatures across `Genus.lean`, `Jacobian.lean`, `AbelJacobi.lean`; NO protected signatures in `Cotangent/GrpObj.lean` — verified by direct read of the yaml). The iter-133 refactor on `Cotangent/GrpObj.lean` only changed docstrings + a `set→let` choice inside the rank-lemma proof body; no signature touched.
- `lean_verify` opaque-pattern warnings at `Cotangent/GrpObj.lean:50, 53, 204` are docstring matches for the literal word "opaque" (the iter-131 status block's description of `Classical.choose` accessors as "named-but-opaque" and the body docstring's "Caveat on canonicity" paragraph). These are false positives from the source-scan pattern matcher and not source-level `opaque` declarations.
- Iter-133's plan-phase work effectively constitutes the "Iter-133 branch (concrete fallback)" tree from iter-132 plan.md — the success-branch action (mathlib-analogist on piece (i.b) BEFORE prover dispatch) was the correct pre-flight for piece (i.b).
